description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage green paint scheme. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each bearing white cross insignias and subtle camouflage patterning. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, also marked with insignias. The cockpit is positioned forward of the wing root and is enclosed with a clear canopy, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The landing gear is a tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era fighter aircraft.
description: A green, camouflage-painted, single-propeller military airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a forward enclosed cockpit, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tail section, vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the straight mid-mounted wings, propeller at the nose, cockpit canopy, and visible landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing layout with landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the camouflage pattern, insignias, and the tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
